result.stdout:
Description:
  Uno Platform WASM Runtime Tests Runner
  
  Prerequisites:
    - Install Playwright: npx playwright install chromium
    - Or: dotnet tool install -g Microsoft.Playwright.CLI && playwright install chromium

Usage:
  Uno.UI.RuntimeTests.Engine.Wasm.Runner [command] [options]

Options:
  --app-path <app-path> (REQUIRED)           Path to the published WASM app directory
  --output <output> (REQUIRED)               Path where test results will be written
  --filter <filter>                          Test filter expression []
  --timeout <timeout>                        Timeout in seconds for test execution [default: 300]
  --port <port>                              Port to serve the WASM app on [default: 0]
  --headless                                 Run browser in headless mode [default: True]
  --browser-path <browser-path>              Path to the browser executable (auto-detected if not specified) []
  --browser-arg <browser-arg>                Additional argument to pass to the browser (can be specified multiple times)
  --query-param <query-param>                Additional query parameter to pass to the app URL in key=value format (can be specified multiple times)
  --browser-log-level <browser-log-level>    Browser logging level: 'none' (suppress all), 'minimal' (errors only), 'verbose' (full logging) [default: minimal]
  --aot-profile-output <aot-profile-output>  Path where AOT profile data will be written (requires app built with WasmShellGenerateAOTProfile=true) []
  --version                                  Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

Commands:
  run  Run WASM runtime tests

Description:

Usage:

Options:

  --output <output> (REQUIRED)               Path where test results will be written
  --filter <filter>                          Test filter expression []

  --port <port>                              Port to serve the WASM app on [default: 0]
  --headless                                 Run browser in headless mode [default: True]
  --browser-path <browser-path>              Path to the browser executable (auto-detected if not specified) []
  --browser-arg <browser-arg>                Additional argument to pass to the browser (can be specified multiple times)
  --query-param <query-param>                Additional query parameter to pass to the app URL in key=value format (can be specified multiple times)
  --browser-log-level <browser-log-level>    Browser logging level: 'none' (suppress all), 'minimal' (errors only), 'verbose' (full logging) [default: minimal]
  --aot-profile-output <aot-profile-output>  Path where AOT profile data will be written (requires app built with WasmShellGenerateAOTProfile=true) []
